name: canadian-regulatory-compliance
description: Canadian regulatory compliance assistant covering Privacy (PIPEDA/Bill C-27), Employment & Labour (ESA/CHRA), Financial & Securities (FINTRAC/OSC), Health & Safety (WHMIS/CCOHS), CASL, Tax Compliance, Immigration & Work Permits, Environmental Compliance (CEPA/carbon pricing), and Corporate Governance (CBCA) across federal and provincial jurisdictions.
